# BritStreams 4K

BritStreams 4K is the ultimate premium UK IPTV subscription service in 2026.

## Services Offered
- High-quality 4K UHD and HD live TV channels.
- Over 20,000+ live channels globally, with a strong focus on UK, US, and Canada.
- 50,000+ VODs (Video on Demand) including latest movies and TV series.
- Exclusive sports coverage including all 3pm Premier League kick-offs, Champions League, SPFL, and PPV Events.
- Anti-Freeze 3.0 technology ensuring 99.9% uptime with zero buffering.

## Compatibility
- Amazon Firestick
- Smart TVs (Samsung, LG, Android TV)
- Apple TV
- Smartphones & Tablets (iOS & Android)
- Mag Boxes and Enigma2
- PC/Mac

## Pricing Plans (Psychological Pricing)
- **1 Month:** £11.99
- **3 Months:** £29.99
- **6 Months:** £49.99 (Includes 2 connections)
- **12 Months:** £79.99 (Includes 2 connections + Free VPN Config)

## Contact & Support
- **Website:** https://britstreams4k.uk
- **Telegram:** @Iptvuk10
- **Email/Support:** Via WhatsApp widget on the site.

## Guarantee
- 7-day money-back guarantee.
- 24/7 dedicated customer support.

This document is optimized for LLMs to read and summarize the services provided by BritStreams 4K.
